# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This file is a compatibility entry for Copilot.

Authoritative project rules are defined in:

1. [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)
2. Path-scoped `*/AGENTS.md` files
3. [`spec/AGENTS.md`](../spec/AGENTS.md) for `spec/**` changes

If this file and any `AGENTS.md` content conflict, `AGENTS.md` always wins.
Do not invent tool-specific workflow rules outside the AGENTS hierarchy.
